8:["$","$L1c",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Team[\"Agent Team\"]\n      A1[Agent A]\n      A2[Agent B]\n      A3[Agent C]\n  end\n  \n  subgraph Storage[\"Storage\"]\n      DBA[(Agent A DB)]\n      DBB[(Agent B DB)]\n      DBC[(Agent C DB)]\n      DBS[(Shared DB)]\n  end\n  \n  A1 -->|private| DBA\n  A2 -->|private| DBB\n  A3 -->|private| DBC\n  A1 -->|shared| DBS\n  A2 -->|shared| DBS\n  A3 -->|shared| DBS\n"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Separate Database Instances"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each agent gets its own ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance. Use separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]," values for isolation, or share a path for coordination:"]}]
b:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Each agent has its own isolated database\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-a\",\n  db_path=\"/data/agent-a/memories.db\",\n)\n\nagent_b = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-b\",\n  db_path=\"/data/agent-b/memories.db\",\n)\n\n# Agent A stores an observation\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  source=\"observation\",\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Agent B cannot see Agent A's memories\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")  # Returns nothing from agent-a's DB\n","language":"python"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Shared Memory Pattern"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":["To share knowledge between agents, point them at the same database file with different ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," values:"]}]
e:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Both agents share the same database file\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-a\",\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n)\n\nagent_b = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-b\",\n  db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\",\n)\n\n# Agent A stores team knowledge\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  source=\"infrastructure-check\",\n  importance=0.9,\n  scope=\"global\",  # Visible to all sessions\n)\n\n# Agent B can recall shared knowledge\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Private vs Shared Context"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," to control what is private vs shared:"]}]
11:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-a\", db_path=\"/shared/team-memory.db\")\n\n# Private to agent-a's session (default)\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"My current subtask: validate user inputs.\",\n  scope=\"session\",\n  importance=0.5,\n)\n\n# Shared with all sessions in this database\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"Deployment target is us-east-1 region.\",\n  scope=\"global\",\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Deployment"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Use a shared volume or network filesystem:"}]
14:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Docker"}],": Named volume mounted to all agents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kubernetes"}],": Shared PVC"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fly.io"}],": Same volume mounted to multiple machines"]}],"\n"]}]

For high-write multi-agent scenarios, consider WAL mode or connection pooling."}]}]]}]]}]}]
